data.name: cancelButton.DeliveryMethodODP
data.value: Cancel delivery method changes.

data.name: cancelButton.FeeTypeODP
data.value: Cancel fee type changes.

data.name: cancelButton.MediaTypeODP
data.value: Cancel media type changes.

data.name: createButton.DeliveryMethodListUI
data.value: Create a new delivery method.

data.name: cancelButton.PaymentMethodODP
data.value: Cancel payment method changes.

data.name: createButton.FeeTypeListUI

data.name: createButton.MediaTypeListUI

data.name: deleteButton.DeliveryMethodListUI

data.name: deleteButton.FeeTypeListUI

data.name: saveButton.DeliveryMethodODP

data.name: saveButton.FeeTypeODP

data.name: saveButton.MediaTypeODP
data.value: Save media type changes.

data.name: saveButton.PaymentMethodODP
data.value: Save payment method changes.

data.name: cancelButton.PageWeightListUI
data.value: Cancel page weight changes.

data.name: saveButton.InvoiceDueListUI
data.value: Save Invoice due date changes.

data.name: cancelButton.InvoiceDueListUI
data.value: Cancel Invoice due date changes.

data.name: saveButton.PageWeightListUI
data.value: Save page weight changes.

data.name: cancelButton.BillingTemplateODP
data.value: Cancel billing template changes.

data.name: createButton.BillingTemplateListUI
data.value: Create a new billing template.

data.name: deleteButton.BillingTemplateListUI
data.value: Delete the selected billing template.

data.name: saveButton.BillingTemplateODP
data.value: Save billing template changes.

data.name: cancelButton.AdjustmentReasonsODP
data.value: Cancel adjustment reason changes.

data.name: createButton.AdjustmentReasonsListUI
data.value: Create a new adjustment reason.

data.name: deleteButton.AdjustmentReasonsListUI
data.value: Delete the selected adjustment reason.

data.name: saveButton.AdjustmentReasonsODP
data.value: Save adjustment reason changes.

data.name: cancelButton.StatusReasonsODP
data.value: Cancel request status reason changes.

data.name: createButton.StatusReasonsListUI
data.value: Create a new request status reason.

data.name: deleteButton.StatusReasonsListUI
data.value: Delete the selected request status reason.

data.name: saveButton.StatusReasonsODP
data.value: Save request status reason changes.

data.name: cancelButton.RequestReasonsODP
data.value: Cancel request reason changes.

data.name: createButton.RequestReasonsListUI
data.value: Create a new request reason.

data.name: deleteButton.RequestReasonsListUI
data.value: Delete the selected request reason.

data.name: saveButton.RequestReasonsODP
data.value: Save request reason changes.

data.name: cancelButton.RequestorTypeODP
data.value: Cancel requestor type changes.

data.name: createButton.RequestorTypeListUI
data.value: Create a new requestor type.

data.name: deleteButton.RequestorTypeListUI
data.value: Delete the selected requestor type.

data.name: saveButton.RequestorTypeODP
data.value: Save requestor type changes.

data.name: cancelButton.DisclosureDocTypesListUI
data.value: Cancel changes to disclosure document designations.

data.name: saveButton.DisclosureDocTypesListUI
data.value: Save changes to disclosure document designations.

data.name: cancelButton.ROIDialog
data.value: Do not proceed to the newly selected code set.

data.name: okButton.ROIDialog
data.value: Save changes and proceed to the newly selected code set.

data.name: browseButton.LetterTemplateODP
data.value: Browse to find a file to provide for the selected letter template.

data.name: cancelButton.LetterTemplateODP
data.value: Cancel letter template changes.

data.name: createButton.LetterTemplateListUI
data.value: Create a new letter template.

data.name: deleteButton.LetterTemplateListUI
data.value: Delete the selected letter template.

data.name: downloadButton
data.value: Download the selected letter template.

data.name: downloadButton.LetterTemplateListUI
data.value: Download the selected letter template.

data.name: ROI.1.11.05
data.value: LetterTemplate description exceeds maximum length

data.name: saveButton.LetterTemplateODP
data.value: Save letter template changes.

data.name: dontDelete
data.value: Do not {0}

data.name: addNewTierButton.PageRateTierGroupUI
data.value: Add a new rate tier to specify additional rates per page range.

data.name: baseChargetextBox.BillingTierTabUI
data.value: A base charge rate must be entered. The flat rate charge must be 0 or greater. Valid characters for this field include positive numbers, a decimal point, and precision of 2 decimal places. Ex: 9.98

data.name: cancelButton.BillingTierODP
data.value: Cancel billing tier changes.

data.name: createButton.BillingTierListUI
data.value: Create a new billing tier.

data.name: deleteButton.BillingTierListUI
data.value: Delete the selected billing tier.

data.name: deleteImg.PageRateTierUI
data.value: Delete this page rate tier

data.name: fromPageTextBox.PageRateTierUI
data.value: Page number entered must be 1 more than the value entered in the "through page" in the preceding page rate tier

data.name: otherChargeTextBox.PageRateTierGroupUI
data.value: Valid characters for this field include positive numbers, a decimal point, and precision of 2 decimal places. Ex: 9.98

data.name: pricePerPageTextBox.PageRateTierUI
data.value: Valid characters for this field include positive numbers, a decimal point, and precision of 2 decimal places. Ex: 9.98

data.name: saveButton.BillingTierODP
data.value: Save billing tier changes.

data.name: toPageTextBox.PageRateTierUI
data.value: Field accepts only positive whole numbers and a maximum value of 9999

data.name: cancel.NavigateOut
data.value: Cancel and return to screen.

data.name: dontSave.NavigateOut
data.value: Discard changes and continue.

data.name: createRequestButton
data.value: Create a new request for the patient selected.

data.name: dobTextBox
data.value: Enter a date of birth for the patient to find. Must be combined with another search field.

data.name: encounterTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the encounter number or account number for the patient to find.

data.name: epnTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the enterprise number for the patient to find.

data.name: facilityComboBox
data.value: Select a facility in which to find the patient. To find in any facility choose All Facilities. Must be combined with another search field.

data.name: findPatientButton
data.value: Find patient based on the search criteria you have entered.

data.name: firstNameTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of a patient first name to find. You must enter a minimum combination of 3 characters between last and first name to perform the search.

data.name: lastNameTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of a patient last name to find. You must enter a minimum combination of 3 characters between last and first name to perform the search.

data.name: moreInfoImage
data.value: Searching by this field alone is not permitted.

data.name: mrnTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the medical record number for the patient to find.

data.name: newPatientButton
data.value: Create a new Non-MPF patient.

data.name: patientRequestButton
data.value: Create a new request for the patient selected as the requestor.

data.name: resetButton
data.value: Clear all find patient criteria and start over.

data.name: ssnTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the social security number for the patient to find.

data.name: patientViewEditButton
data.value: View or edit the selected patient.

data.name: NonUniquePatientDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Do not save the patient.

data.name: NonUniquePatientDialog.OkButton
data.value: Save the patient.

data.name: DeletePatientDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Do not delete this patient.

data.name: DeletePatientDialog.OkButton
data.value: Delete this Non-MPF patient record.

data.name: allRequestorsRadioButton.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Select Recent Requestors to find only requestors who have recently made a request.Select All Requestors to search requestors without regard to when the requestor was last used on a request.

data.name: createRequestButton.FindRequestorListUI
data.value: Begin creating a new request with the requestor you have selected above.

data.name: dobTextBox.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Enter a date of birth for the patient to find.Must be combined with another search field.

data.name: dobMoreInfo.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Searching by this field alone is not permitted.

data.name: findRequestorButton.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Find requestor based on the search criteria you have entered.

data.name: newRequestorButton.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Create a new requestor.

data.name: patientEpnTextBox.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the enterprise number for the patient to find.

data.name: patientSsnTextBox.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the social security number for the patient to find.

data.name: recentRequestorsRadioButton.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Select Recent Requestors to find only requestors who have recently made a request.Select All Requestors to search requestors without regard to when the requestor was last used on a request.

data.name: requestorNameTextBox.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of a requestor name to find.

data.name: requestorTypeComboBox.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Select the type of requestor to find from a list.

data.name: resetButton.FindRequestorSearchUI
data.value: Clear all find requestor criteria and start over.

data.name: viewEditButton
data.value: View or edit the requestor you have selected above.

data.name: address1TextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter line one of the patient's main address.

data.name: address2TextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter line two of the patient's main address.

data.name: address3TextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter line three of the patient's main address.

data.name: cityTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the city of the patient's main address.

data.name: deletePatientButton.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Delete this Non-MPF patient record from ROI. This can only be completed if the patient has not been included on a request.

data.name: dobTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's date of birth.

data.name: epnTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's EPN.

data.name: facilityComboBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select or enter the facility for the patient

data.name: genderComboBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select the patient's gender.

data.name: homePhoneTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's home phone number.

data.name: mrnTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's medical record number.

data.name: nameTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's name in the format: <last name>, <first name>

data.name: revertButton.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Discard any changes since last save and revert fields to the last saved state.

data.name: saveButton.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Save changes to this patient.

data.name: ssnTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's social security number

data.name: stateTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select the state of the patient's main address.

data.name: vipCheckBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Check this box to mark a Non-MPF patient as VIP.

data.name: workPhoneTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's work phone number.

data.name: zipTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the zip code of the patient's main address.

data.name: disclosureCheckBox
data.value: Filter records to show disclosure documents only.

data.name: documentRadioButton
data.value: Sort the MPF documents in the patient record view by Document Name (which will display the documents alphabetically by encounter.)

data.name: editDocumentButton
data.value: Edit the selected Non-MPF document.

data.name: encounterRadioButton
data.value: Sort the MPF documents in the patient record view by Encounter (which will display the documents in chart order) or by Document Name (which will display the documents alphabetically by encounter.)

data.name: newDocumentButton
data.value: Create a new Non-MPF document for this patient.

data.name: recordViewComboBox
data.value: Filter the documents by record view. This filter does not apply to global and Non-MPF documents.

data.name: setUpdateButton
data.value: Set or change a filter to only display information related to a set of selected encounters. (Not available for Non-MPF patients or Non-MPF records.)

data.name: showVersionCheckBox
data.value: Show document versions in the patient record view.

data.name: viewAllButton
data.value: Display all documents except Attachments and Non-MPF documents in the system document viewer.

data.name: viewSelectedButton
data.value: Open document(s) in the system document viewer.

data.name: cancelButton.Edit.NonHpfDocumentDialog
data.value: Cancel any edit(s) to this Non-MPF document.

data.name: deleteButton.NonHpfDocumentDialog
data.value: Delete this Non-MPF document.

data.name: saveButton.Edit.NonHpfDocumentDialog
data.value: Save updates to this Non-MPF document.

data.name: editDocumentButton.PatientRecordsView
data.value: Edit the selected Non-MPF document.

data.name: newDocumentButton.PatientRecordsView
data.value: Create a new Non-MPF document for this patient.

data.name: viewAllButton.PatientRecordsView
data.value: Display all documents except Attachments and Non-MPF documents in the system document viewer.

data.name: viewSelectedButton.PatientRecordsView
data.value: Open document(s) in the system document viewer.

data.name: address1TextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter line one of the requestor's {0}.

data.name: address2TextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter line two of the requestor's {0}.

data.name: address3TextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter line three of the requestor's {0}.

data.name: cellPhoneTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the cell phone of the requestor.

data.name: cityTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the city of the requestor's {0}.

data.name: contactEmailTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the email of the contact person for the requestor.

data.name: contactNameTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the name of the contact person for the requestor.

data.name: contactPhoneTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the phone number of the contact person for the requestor.

data.name: deleteRequestorButton.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Delete this requestor. Only requestors that do not appear on a request can be deleted.

data.name: DeleteRequestorDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Do not delete this requestor.

data.name: DeleteRequestorDialog.OkButton
data.value: Delete this requestor.

data.name: dobTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient requestor's date of birth

data.name: emailTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor's email address.

data.name: epnTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient requestor's EPN

data.name: faxTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor's fax number.

data.name: homePhoneTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the home phone of the requestor.

data.name: letterRequiredCheckBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Check to note that a certification letter is required for this requestor.

data.name: nameTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor's name.

data.name: NonUniqueRequestorDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Do not save the requestor.

data.name: NonUniqueRequestorDialog.OkButton
data.value: Save the requestor.

data.name: paymentRequiredCheckBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Check to note that pre-payment is required for this requestor.

data.name: requestorTypeCombo.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Select the type of requestor from a list. This value cannot be changed after the requestor is saved for the first time.

data.name: revertButton.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Discard any changes since last save and revert fields to the last saved state.

data.name: saveButton.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Save changes to this requestor.

data.name: ssnTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient requestor's social security number.

data.name: stateTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the state of the requestor's {0}.

data.name: workPhoneTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the work phone of the requestor.

data.name: zipTextBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the zip code of the requestor's {0}.

data.name: revertButton.PatientRecordFooterActions
data.value: Discard any changes since last save and revert fields to the last saved state.

data.name: saveButton.PatientRecordFooterActions
data.value: Save changes to this patient record.

data.name: DeleteNonHpfDocumentDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Do not delete this Non-MPF document.

data.name: DeleteNonHpfDocumentDialog.OkButton
data.value: Delete this Non-MPF document.

data.name: cancelButton.EncounterFilterDialog
data.value: Close this dialog and do not change the filter.

data.name: filterOffEncounterButton.EncounterFilterDialog
data.value: Turn off filtering by encounter.

data.name: filterOnEncounterButton.EncounterFilterDialog
data.value: Turn on encounter filter for the encounters checked in the grid.

data.name: closeButton.DeficiencyDialog
data.value: Close this dialog and return to viewing patient records.

data.name: DeleteRequestDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Don’t delete the request.

data.name: DeleteRequestDialog.OkButton
data.value: Proceed and delete the request.

data.name: cancelButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to cancel the creation of this request.

data.name: cellPhoneTextBox.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor's cell phone number for this request. If you change the cell phone number here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: changeRequestorButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to change the requestor of this request.

data.name: contactNameTextBox.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the Requestor’s contact name for this request. If you change the contact name here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: contactPhoneTextBox.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the Requestor’s contact phone for this request. If you change the contact phone here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: continueButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to proceed to complete creating this request.

data.name: deleteRequestButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Delete this request.

data.name: faxTextBox.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor fax number for this request. If you change the fax number here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: homePhoneTextBox.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor's home phone number for this request. If you change the home phone number here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: revertButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to revert to the last saved state for fields on this page.

data.name: saveButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to save any changes made to this request.

data.name: selectReqButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to choose a requestor for this request.

data.name: updateReqStatusButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to update the status and/or reason(s) for this request.

data.name: viewEditRequestorButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to view or edit the requestor's profile information.

data.name: workPhoneTextBox.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the requestor's work phone number for this request. If you change the work phone number here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: cancelButton.RequestCommentInfoUI
data.value: Select to cancel the newly entered comment. It will not be saved to the comment history.

data.name: commentSaveButton.RequestCommentInfoUI
data.value: Select to save the newly entered comment to add to the comment history.

data.name: cancelButton.SelectRequestorUI
data.value: Select to cancel selection of a requestor and return to the request information screen.

data.name: selectRequestorButton.SelectRequestorUI
data.value: Select to add the selected requestor as the requestor for the request.

data.name: addFreeFormReasonButton.ChangeRequestStatusUI
data.value: Select to add a freeform reason for the selected status.

data.name: cancelButton.ChangeRequestStatusUI
data.value: Select to cancel any changes to the request status and return to the request information screen.

data.name: deleteFreeformReasonImg.FreeformReasonUI
data.value: Delete this freeform reason.

data.name: saveButton.ChangeRequestStatusUI
data.value: Select to save an updates to the request status and return to the request information screen.

data.name: cancelButton.SaveNewPatientRequestorUI
data.value: Select to cancel the creation of this new patient requestor, cease the creation of the new request, and return to the Patients tab.

data.name: saveNewRequestorButton.SaveNewPatientRequestorUI
data.value: Select to save this new patient requestor and add this requestor to the request.

data.name: cancelButton.PatientMatchingUI
data.value: Cancel and return to the select requestor dialog.

data.name: continueWithNoPatientButton.PatientMatchingUI
data.value: Select to continue working on the request with no patient(s) added.

data.name: continueWithSelectedPatientsButton.PatientMatchingUI
data.value: Select to add the selected patient(s) to the request and continue working on the request.

data.name: cancelButton.MatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Cancel the process of creating a new request with the selected patient and return to the patients tab.

data.name: cancelButton.NoMatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Cancel the process of creating a new request with the selected patient and return to the patients tab.

data.name: cancelButton.MismatchPatientUI
data.value: Cancel and return to patient selection.

data.name: continueSelectedPatientsButton.MismatchPatientUI
data.value: Continue creating the request with the selected patient(s).

data.name: newRequestorButton.MatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Create a new requestor with the selected patient.

data.name: selectPatientAsRequestorButton.NoMatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Create a new requestor with the selected patient. Upon selection a new request will be created with the selected patient as the requestor.

data.name: selectRequestorButton.MatchingRequestorUI
data.value: Create a new request with the selected patient requestor.

data.name: findRequestButton
data.value: Find request based on the search criteria you have entered.

data.name: newRequestButton
data.value: Create a new request.

data.name: openViewRequestButton
data.value: Open the selected request to view and/or edit.

data.name: resetRequestButton
data.value: Clear all find request criteria and start over.

data.name: dobTextBox.RequestSearchUI
data.value: Select a date of birth for the patient to find on a request.

data.name: facilityComboBox.ReqeustSearchUI
data.value: Select a facility in which to find a request. To find in any facility choose All Facilities. Must be combined with another search field.

data.name: patientEncounterTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the encounter number or account number for the patient to find on a request.

data.name: patientEpnTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the enterprise number for the patient to find on a request.

data.name: patientFirstNameTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of a patient first name to find on a request. If you search by patient name, you must enter a minimum combination of 3 characters between the last and first name to perform the search.

data.name: patientLastNameTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of a patient last name to find on a request. If you search by patient name, you must enter a minimum combination of 3 characters between the last and first name to perform the search.

data.name: patientMrnTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the medical record number for the patient to find on a request.

data.name: patientSsnTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of the social security number for the patient to find on a request.

data.name: receiptDateComboBox
data.value: Select a preset date range for the receipt date of a request or select Custom Range to enter a date range of your choosing. The option All will return every request in the system regardless of date meeting the other search criteria.

data.name: requestorNameTextBox
data.value: Enter all or the beginning characters of a requestor name to find on a request. At least 2 characters must be entered. This field may also be used to filter the requests displayed by requestor.

data.name: requestStatusComboBox
data.value: Select the status of the request to find. This field may also be used to filter the requests displayed by status. To see all statuses choose All Statuses.

data.name: requestTypeComboBox
data.value: Select the type of requestor to find for a request. This field may also be used to filter the requests displayed by requestor type.

data.name: invoiceNumberTextBox
data.value: Enter exact invoice number to find a request.

data.name: requestIdTextBox
data.value: Enter exact request ID to find a request.

data.name: requestorTypeComboBox
data.value: Select the type of requestor to find for a request. This field may also be used to filter the requests displayed by requestor type.

data.name: addPatientCloseButton.AddPatientUI
data.value: Add the selected patient to the request and close this dialog to return to the patient information screen.

data.name: addPatientContinueButton.AddPatientUI
data.value: Add the selected patient to the request and continue adding patients to the request.

data.name: cancelButton.AddPatientUI
data.value: Select to cancel adding a patient to the request and return to the patient information screen.

data.name: addAnotherPatientButton.RequestPatientListUI
data.value: Add another patient to this request.

data.name: addPatientButton.RequestPatientListUI
data.value: Select to add a patient to this new request.

data.name: closeButton.ViewEditPatientUI
data.value: Close this dialog and return to the patient information screen.

data.name: closeButton.ViewEditRequestorUI
data.value: Close this dialog and return to the request information screen.

data.name: removePatientButton.RequestPatientListUI
data.value: Remove the selected patient from this request. If you have released records for the selected patient they cannot be removed.

data.name: revertButton.ViewEditPatientUI
data.value: Discard any changes and revert to the last saved state.

data.name: revertButton.ViewEditRequestorUI
data.value: Discard any changes and revert to the last saved state.

data.name: saveButton.ViewEditPatientUI
data.value: Save changes to the patient's information.

data.name: saveButton.ViewEditRequestorUI
data.value: Save changes to the requestor's information.

data.name: viewEditPatientButton.RequestPatientListUI
data.value: Select to view or edit the selected patient's profile.

data.name: NoDocumentsReleasedDialog.OkButton
data.value: Don't set status as complete and return to the Update Status Dialog.
data.comment: Change Request Status - No Documents Released Dialog

data.name: PartiallyReleasedDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Don't set status as complete and return to the Update Status Dialog.
data.comment: Change Request Status - Partially Released Dialog

data.name: PartiallyReleasedDialog.OkButton
data.value: Set status as complete.
data.comment: Change Request Status - Partially Released Dialog

data.name: PatientWithoutReleaseDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Don't set status as complete and return to the Update Status Dialog.
data.comment: Change Request Status - Patient Without Release Dialog

data.name: PatientWithoutReleaseDialog.OkButton
data.value: Set status as complete.
data.comment: Change Request Status - Patient Without Release Dialog

data.name: cancelButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select to cancel the creation of this request.

data.name: newSaveButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select to save this new request.

data.name: revertButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select to revert to the last saved state for fields on this page.

data.name: saveButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select to save any changes made to this request.

data.name: removeAllButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Remove all items from the Document(s) selected for Release. Previously released documents cannot be removed.

data.name: removeButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Remove the selected items from the Document(s) selected for Release. Previously released documents cannot be removed.

data.name: DiscardChangesDialog.CancelButton
data.value: Do not proceed and remain on the page.

data.name: DiscardChangesDialog.OkButton
data.value: Proceed and no changes will be saved.

data.name: addAllButton
data.value: Add all documents for the selected patient to the Document(s) selected for Release section

data.name: addButton
data.value: Add the selected item for the selected patient to the Document(s) selected for Release section

data.name: systemimage
data.value: This data is provided by the system and cannot be deleted.

data.name: userimage
data.value: This data can be deleted.

data.name: save.NavigateOut
data.value: Save changes and continue.

data.name: deleteButton.ConfigureNotesListUI
data.value: Delete a selected configure notes

data.name: createButton.ConfigureNotesListUI
data.value: Create new configure notes

data.name: revertButton.RequestorInfoMCP.CreateNew
data.value: Cancel the creation of the new requestor and return to the Find Requestor tab.

data.name: rangeCombo.PresetDateRange
data.value: Select a preset date range for the receipt date of a request or select Custom Range to enter a date range of your choosing. The option All will return every request in the system regardless of date meeting the other search criteria.

data.name: viewEditRequestButton.FindRequestODP
data.value: Open the selected request to view and/or edit.

data.name: viewEditRequestButton.RequestHistoryMCP
data.value: Open the selected request in the Requests tab.

data.name: revertButton.PatientInfoMCP.CreateNew
data.value: Cancel the creation of a Non-MPF Patient.

data.name: NonDeletedPatientDialog.OkButton
data.value: Close this dialog.

data.name: NonDeletedRequestorDialog.OkButton
data.value: Close this dialog.

data.name: sortByLabel
data.value: Sort the MPF documents in the patient record view by Encounter (which will display the documents in chart order) or by Document Name (which will display the documents alphabetically by encounter.)

data.name: invoiceButton.BillingPaymentInfoMCP
data.value: Select to create an invoice.

data.name: preBillButton.BillingPaymentInfoMCP
data.value: Select to create a pre-bill.

data.name: releaseButton.BillingPaymentInfoMCP
data.value: Select to release the selected documents. An output method must be selected before you will be able to release.

data.name: revertButton.BillingPaymentInfoMCP
data.value: Select to revert to the last saved state for fields on this page.

data.name: saveButton.BillingPaymentInfoMCP
data.value: Select to save any changes made to billing, shipping, fee charges or adjustments and payments for this request.

data.name: addAdjustmentButton.AdjustmentPaymentInfoUI
data.value: Click to add the adjustment to this request.

data.name: addPaymentButton.AdjustmentPaymentInfoUI
data.value: Click to add the payment to this request.

data.name: adjustmentAmountTextBox.AdjustmentPaymentInfoUI
data.value: Enter the amount of the adjustment.

data.name: createCustomeFeeButton.FeeChargeUI
data.value: Select to add a custom fee for this request.

data.name: deleteImg.CustomFeeUI
data.value: Delete this custom fee.

data.name: paymentAmountTextBox.AdjustmentPaymentInfoUI
data.value: Enter the amount of the payment.

data.name: paymentNoteTextBox.AdjustmentPaymentInfoUI
data.value: Enter information about the payment such as check number or credit card number.

data.name: reasonComboBox.AdjustmentPaymentInfoUI
data.value: Select or enter a reason for the adjustment. All adjustments must have a reason.

data.name: address1TextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping address for this request. If you change the address here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: address2TextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping address for this request. If you change the address here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: address3TextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping address for this request. If you change the address here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: cityTextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping city for this request. If you change the city here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: resetAddressButton.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Select to reset the shipping address from the current custom address to the requestor’s main or alternate address.

data.name: shippingChargesTextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping charges for the release.

data.name: stateTextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping state for this request. If you change the state here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: trackingNumberTextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping tracking number obtained from the shipping provider.

data.name: zipTextBox.ShippingInfoUI
data.value: Enter the shipping zip for this request. If you change the zip here it will only apply to the request.

data.name: closeButton.ChargeHistoryDialogUI
data.value: Select to close and return to the Release & Invoice screen.

data.name: deleteFreeformImg.FreeformUI
data.value: Select to delete this freeform note.

data.name: cancelButton.InvoiceUI
data.value: Select to cancel the creation of the invoice and return to the Release & Invoice screen.

data.name: cancelButton.PreBillUI
data.value: Select to cancel the creation of the pre-bill and return to the Release & Invoice screen.

data.name: continueButton.InvoiceUI
data.value: Select to create and view a preview of the invoice.

data.name: continueButton.PreBillUI
data.value: Select to create and view a preview of the pre-bill.

data.name: createFreeformButton.InvoiceUI
data.value: Select to add a freeform note for this invoice.

data.name: createFreeformButton.PreBillUI
data.value: Select to add a freeform note for this pre-bill.

data.name: clearAllButton.ReportPane
data.value: Click to unselect all values in the listbox.

data.name: selectAllButton.ReportPane
data.value: Click to select all values in the listbox.

data.name: resetButton.ReportPane
data.value: Click to reset the filter criteria to their default values.

data.name: runReportButton.ReportPane
data.value: Click to run the report with the selected reports criteria.

data.name: DeleteBillingTierDialog.CancelButton

data.name: DeleteBillingTierDialog.OkButton

data.name: DeleteCustomFeeDialog.CancelButton

data.name: DeleteCustomFeeDialog.OkButton
data.value: Proceed and delete the custom fee.

data.name: release.cancelButton
data.value:
Select to cancel the creation of the letter(s) only and return to the Release screen. Upon return to the Release screen you may select a new
letter template or deselect adding a letter to the release in order to continue with the release.

data.name: RequestHistoryUI.createRequestButton
data.value: Create a new request with this patient.

data.name: viewAuthRequestButton.RequestInfoMCP
data.value: Select to view the associated authorization request

data.name: viewAuthRequestButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP
data.value: Select to view the associated authorization request

data.name: requestPatientLockedImage
data.value: Patient and/or Encounter is/are locked.

data.name: requestPatientVipImage
data.value: The patient of this request is VIP.

data.name: saveBillButton.RequestPatientInfoMCP

data.name: chargeHistoryButton.BillingPaymentInfoMCP

data.name: requestReasonComboBox
data.value: Please select equates to NO filter on this field.

data.name: cancelButton.OutputFaxDialog
data.value: Select to cancel the fax job.

data.name: cancelButton.OutputFileDialog
data.value: Select to cancel the job.

data.name: cancelButton.OutputPrintDialog
data.value: Select to cancel the print job.

data.name: mediaComboBox.OutputFileDialog
data.value: Select the media type in which the PDF will be saved (for example burned to a CD). The selected media type will determine how large the PDF file should be and will create multiple PDF files if needed.

data.name: okButton.OutputFaxDialog
data.value: Select to fax the job.

data.name: okButton.OutputFileDialog
data.value: Select to save this job as a file.

data.name: okButton.OutputPrintDialog
data.value: Select to print the job.

data.name: secretWordTextBox.OutputFileDialog
data.value: The entered password, if entered, will be used to encrypt the PDF file. This password should be given to the requestor, so that he/she can open it when the file is received.

data.name: propertiesButton.OutputPrintDialog
data.value: Select to view and update properties for the selected printer to output the selected job.

data.name: ReportPane.patientViewEditButton
data.value: Click to add the selected patient for AOD report.

data.name: statusCheckBox.RequestorInfoMCP
data.value: Check to note that the requestor has an Inactive status.
data.comment: Check to note that the requestor has an Inactive status.

data.name: statusCombo.FindRequestorSearchUI

data.name: CustomShippingAddressDialog.IgnoreButton

data.name: RecordViewDialog.OkButton

data.name: collapseButton
data.value: Select to collapse the documents in document tree.

data.name: expandButton
data.value: Select to expand the documents in document tree.

data.name: selectPatientAsRequestorButton.CreatePatientRequestorUI

data.name: AttachmentSelectedErrorDialog.OkButton
data.value: Close this dialog.

data.name: queuePassword
data.value: This password allows access to all documents in the queue from which this document originated. It reflects the time of the release and may differ from the current queue password.

data.name: queuePassword.columnHeader
data.value: The passwords in this column allow access to all documents in the queue from which each document originated. They reflect the time of the release and may differ from current queue passwords.

data.name: requestPassword
data.value: This password allows access to all documents in the request.

data.name: requestPassword.columnHeader
data.value: The passwords in this column allow access to all documents in this request

data.name: emailTextBox.PatientInfoMCP
data.value: Enter the patient's email address.

data.name: discTypeComboBox.OutputDiscDialog

data.name: passwordTextBox.OutputDiscDialog
data.value: The entered password, if entered, will be used to encrypt the disc file. This password should be given to the requestor, so that he/she can open it when the file is received..

data.name: secretWordTextBox.OutputDiscDialog
data.value: The entered password, if entered, will be used to encrypt the disc file. This password should be given to the requestor, so that he/she can open it when the file is received..

data.name: secretWordTextBox.OutputEmailDialog
data.value: The entered password, if entered, will be used to encrypt the PDF file. This password should be given to the requestor, so that he/she can open it when the file is received.
